name: Platformer
description: Jump-and-run gameplay focused on precise movement, timing, and obstacle navigation

mechanics.coreLoop: Navigate platforming challenges → Collect items and power-ups → Defeat or avoid enemies → Reach level goal → Unlock new worlds/abilities → Master advanced techniques
playerActions: Run, jump, and double jump across platforms
Wall jump, dash, and advanced movement techniques
Collect coins, gems, or collectibles scattered in levels
Discover secret areas and hidden paths
Activate switches and solve simple puzzles
Time movements to avoid hazards (spikes, pits, moving obstacles)

mechanics: Complete levels sequentially to unlock new worlds
Collect all items in a level for 100% completion
Unlock new abilities through story milestones (double jump, dash, etc.)
Find secret exits to unlock bonus levels
Extra lives system or checkpoint-based progression

winConditions: Reach the end goal/flagpole of the level
Collect all required items (stars, moons, emblems)
Complete all main levels and bonus challenges
failConditions: Fall into pits or lava (lose a life)
Take damage when unprotected (life-based or checkpoint restart)
Run out of lives (game over, restart from checkpoint or world)

resourceSystems.name: Lives
resourceSystems.mechanics: Extra chances before game over, earned by collecting 100 coins or finding 1-ups

resourceSystems.name: Health/Hit Points
resourceSystems.mechanics: Some platformers use health system instead of instant death

resourceSystems.name: Collectibles (Coins/Gems)
resourceSystems.mechanics: Scattered throughout levels, unlock bonuses or extra lives

resourceSystems.name: Power-ups
resourceSystems.mechanics: Temporary abilities like fire flower, invincibility star, flight

setting.location: Colorful kingdoms with themed worlds (grass, desert, water, ice, volcano, sky, space)
setting.worldType: Cartoonish and vibrant with imaginative level designs

protagonist.background: Unlikely hero (plumber, adventurer, small creature) with exceptional jumping ability
protagonist.motivation: Rescue kidnapped friend/princess, save the kingdom, stop evil villain, or explore for treasure

conflict.primary: Evil villain has kidnapped someone or stolen something precious, threatening the peaceful world
secondary: Navigate dangerous worlds created or corrupted by villain
Defeat minions and bosses guarding each world
Rivals or anti-heroes complicating the mission

worldRules.physics: Exaggerated jumping physics, players can float slightly or control air movement
worldRules.magic: Power-ups grant temporary magical abilities; some worlds have magical properties
worldRules.technology: Minimal technology, mostly mechanical contraptions and simple machines

targetAudience: All ages, especially those who enjoy mechanical mastery
